rationale: The current winner already benefits from late soft roundtrip snaps, but it still pushes every floating tensor equally and hard-snaps fp16-rescued tensors on the first quant-aware pass. This change keeps full-strength pressure on projection weights, which are the highest-leverage path for final int8 error, while delaying all other floating tensors with a squared mix so the model spends less of the short late-training budget overfitting to broad quantization noise.
title: Projection-First Quant-Aware Power Ramp
